content_body: My family and I had a wonderful stay at your cabin. It was VERY well equipped and we appreciated all the little touches. The kitchen was stocked wth everything we needed. Our week here has been so relaxing and peaceful - we are really sad  to be leaving tomorrow. Playing pool, checkers, watching TV by the fireplace, watching the train go by, taking walks along the road, star gazing... it all made for a wonderful Christmas getaway. My kids are older teens so staying at the cabin most days was just fine for them (and us!). :) We can't thank you enough for all the thought put into making sure we had everything we needed - even a Christmas tree! We had a great time here!!
title: Wonderful Christmas Getaway With Everything We Needed!
